steps.title: Find the contextual signal
steps.content: The narrator says the hardest part of telling a story is finding the beginning. "Beginning" is one component of a story (alongside middle, end), so "part" here refers to one of the constituent pieces of the storytelling process.

steps.title: Match to the closest synonym
steps.content:
An element is a component or constituent piece — exactly the relationship between "beginning" and a story. Zone (a region), melody (a tune), and blob (a shapeless mass) don't fit a story's components.

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
